page.title: Category:Appointed members of the House of Peers

revision.comment: Cat:日本の帝国議会議員、の下位カテゴリー。

revision.text:
[[大日本帝国]][[貴族院]]の[[勅選議員]]の[[Wikipedia:カテゴリ|カテゴリ]]です。
[[Category:日本の帝国議会議員|*]]

[[大日本帝国憲法]]下の[[貴族院]]の[[勅選議員]]の[[Wikipedia:カテゴリ|カテゴリ]]です。
[[Category:日本の帝国議会議員|*]]

[[大日本帝国憲法]]下の[[貴族院]]の[[勅選議員]]の[[Wikipedia:カテゴリ|カテゴリ]]です。
[[Category:貴族院議員 (帝国議会)|*]]

revision.comment: {{CategoryTOC}}

revision.text:
[[大日本帝国憲法]]下の[[貴族院]]の[[勅選議員]]の[[Wikipedia:カテゴリ|カテゴリ]]です。
[[Category:貴族院議員 (帝国議会)|*]]

revision.comment: 議論の告知
目次付す
告知、外す
r2.7.3) (ロボットによる: [[zh:Category:貴族院勅選議員]]を追加
r2.7.3) (ロボットによる: [[zh:Category:貴族院勅選議員]]から[[zh:Category:貴族院敕選議員]]へ変更
ボット: 言語間リンク 1 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q14566271]] に転記
[[Category:日本の貴族院議員]]へ移行。
[[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[大日本帝国憲法]]下の[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]の[[貴族院 (日本)#勅任議員|勅任議員]]のカテゴリ。 Category:日本の貴...'
revision.text:
[[大日本帝国憲法]]下の[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]の[[貴族院 (日本)#勅任議員|勅任議員]]のカテゴリ。
[[Category:日本の貴族院議員|ちよくにん]]

[[大日本帝国憲法]]下の[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]の[[貴族院 (日本)#勅任議員|勅任議員]]のカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:貴族院皇族議員]] * [[:Category:貴族院華族議員]]
[[Category:日本の貴族院議員|ちよくにん]]

revision.comment: 体裁を調整。
体裁を調整。
修正。

==Japanese Content== [[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]][[勅選議員]]に関するカテゴリ。 <!--該当人物は現在収容する645名で全員。--> {{Catlink|貴族院多額納税者議員‎|貴族院帝国学士院会員議員|貴族院朝鮮勅選議員|貴族院台湾勅選議員‎‎}} {{CategoryTOC}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:貴族院勅選議員|version=90129235}} [[ja:Category:貴族院勅選議員]]
==Old Content== ==Japanese Content== [[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]][[勅選議員]]に関するカテゴリ。 <!--該当人物は現在収容する645名で全員。--> {{Catlink|貴族院多額納税者議員‎|貴族院帝国学士院会員議員|貴族院朝鮮勅選議員|貴族院台湾勅選議員‎‎}} {{CategoryTOC}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:貴族院勅選議員|version=90129235}} [[ja:Category:貴族院勅選議員]]
==Old Content==
==15T15:00:49Z==
[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Maruyama Sakura]].
[[ja:Category:貴族院勅選議員]] [[zh:Category:貴族院敕選議員]] {{translated page|ja|Category:貴族院勅選議員|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]][[貴族院 (日本)#勅任議員|勅任議員]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{Catlink|貴族院皇族議員|貴族院華族議員}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{Catlink|貴族院皇族議員|貴族院華族議員}} {{Catlink|貴族院多額納税者議員‎|貴族院帝国学士院会員議員|貴族院朝鮮勅選議員|貴族院台湾勅選議員‎‎}} {{CategoryTOC}} {{translated page|ja|Category:貴族院勅任議員|comment=category history here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:貴族院勅任議員|version=67983289}} {{translated page|ja|Category:貴族院勅選議員|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:貴族院勅選議員|version=90129235}} [[Category:Appointed members of the House of Peers]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Members of the House of Peers (Japan)]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:貴族院勅任議員]] [[ja:Category:貴族院勅選議員]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:貴族院勅選議員]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Maruyama Sakura]] [[zh:Category:貴族院敕任議員]] [[zh:Category:貴族院敕選議員]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q24816084, Q14566271)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Add page with conflicting Wikidata QIDs
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Pages with conflicting qids]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q14566271, Q24816084)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
